title: You Gotta Be Squidding Me
body:
![You Gotta Be Squidding Me](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1157101577350414398/1163968173540913303/image.png?ex=654180d6&is=652f0bd6&hm=f38ddae401137e79595cb4be2d4c7af9387e3d5648930b6a5598525f82af2fa1&)

---
**Do YOU think that squids are useless? Well, You Gotta Be Squidding Me!**

This mod adds new uses to the squids, the oldest and most forgotten aquatic animals in Minecraft.

<details>
<summary>New Features</summary>

![squid tentacles items](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1157101577350414398/1163976068940697763/image.png?ex=65418830&is=652f1330&hm=2b3cf03a769be2546a6aef891a72ebee7de200113ff51beab37c61605f3825d3&)

**Squid Tentacles**: 
Squids will now drop Squid Tentacles, which can be eated raw or cooked. They also serve one more purpose:

![alternative way of crafting lead](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1157101577350414398/1163977163356250162/image.png?ex=65418935&is=652f1435&hm=7d318738c28dd31d22be65a90d9f15371a2d75c33d3ce97189d073e548cba23e&)

**Alternative Crafting Recipe for Lead**:
Squid Tentacles can now be used to craft one single lead, making it not the most effective way of crafting leads, but the easiest.

More features will come in the future!
</details>

The mod also has PT-BR (Brazilian Portuguese) and PT-PT (Portugal Portuguese) translations!
